summary.shape_sentence: Bullish recovery day: early liquidation into LOD, strong late-morning trend up, midday topping range, then afternoon selloff with a late bounce into a modest green close.

goat.note: Strongest clean impulse was the late-morning vertical reclaim from below 25000 into the 25130s.

red_circles.behavior: Most relevant near the midday and early-afternoon topping area around 25180-25205 before the post-14:00 breakdown.

green_circles.behavior: Most important around the early flush low near 24820 and the late-day bounce zone around 24955-24970.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25180-25205 was tested repeatedly and respected; price failed to sustain above it.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 24820-24860 held the morning flush; later demand near 24950-24970 held into the closing rebound.

time_markers.10am_blue: Recovering from the opening flush near 24940-24970 and beginning the upside reversal.
time_markers.12pm_red: Strong bullish continuation near 25135-25160, approaching the eventual midday high.
time_markers.2pm_green: Elevated near 25155-25175 but transitioning from topping/range behavior into lower highs.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 25018 after a late rebound; green on the day but well below the midday high.

tags.banks_respected: morning demand and midday supply respected
tags.banks_broken: minor intraday supports broke during the afternoon selloff

takeaway: Bullish reversal day with an early stop-run flush, a powerful late-morning reclaim, and a midday supply cap. Best reference comparison: early demand defense into trend-up continuation, followed by failed high acceptance and a post-14:00 liquidation that still closed green after a late rebound.
